title: fresh adventures [Neoforge] v4
description: Fresh Adventures is vanilla+ modpack that has more adventures than any other modpack
body:
## **Fresh adventures**
Fresh adventures is vanilla+ modpack for version 1.21.1 and it aims to have more adventures than magic or tech. it has many famous mods. Fresh adventures also tries to capture the same experience as the old better minecraft plus. It also has gear better than netherite, a lot of new bosses and exciting adventures. It also has 9 new dimensions, overhauled world generation, quests, new mobs, and many new structures. You can also get so good gear that nothing can kill you but it will take so much grinding
